creator: alex.perechnev@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #4)
I'd messaged Monero developers in their IRC channel a couple of days ago and they created a task for migrating to Qt6 (https://github.com/monero-project/monero-gui/issues/4348). If no one has free time to deal with it, I'll try to do it myself. But for now Qt5 is the only option for Monero GUI.
